ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2006 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2006 Continued To Nov-01-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-26-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Sally Morin, Esq. for Plaintiff: S. Friedman, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: John V. Gallagher dba Best Plumbing as follows:
Damages $4,533.00
Prejudgment Interest $523.00
Attorney's Fees $800.00
Costs $559.00, for a total of $6,415.00
Judgment signed in open court.
